ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "initial_temperature" REAL /* Initial temperature of the reaction */,
  "initial_pressure" REAL /* Initial pressure of the reaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment and its purpose */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "initial_concentrations" TEXT /* JSON object storing initial concentrations of all species */,
  "temperature_profile" TEXT /* JSON object storing temperature changes over time */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical species */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the species */,
  "phase" TEXT /* Phase of the species (e.g., gas, liquid, solid) */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number for the species */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the species */,
  "state_of_matter" TEXT /* More detailed state of matter (e.g., gas, liquid, solid, plasma) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment from which the data point was collected */,
  "time" REAL /* Time elapsed since the start of the experiment */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "density" REAL /* Density at the time of data collection */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the time of data collection */,
  "H2_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of H2 at the time of data collection */,
  "H_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of H at the time of data collection */,
  "O_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of O at the time of data collection */,
  "O2_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of O2 at the time of data collection */,
  "OH_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of OH at the time of data collection */,
  "H2O_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of H2O at the time of data collection */,
  "HO2_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of HO2 at the time of data collection */,
  "H2O2_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of H2O2 at the time of data collection */,
  "AR_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of AR at the time of data collection */,
  "N2_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of N2 at the time of data collection */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the raw data file for the data point */,
  "data_file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the raw data file */,
  "data_file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the raw data file for integrity verification */,
  "measurement_error" REAL /* Error or uncertainty in the measurements */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
